E,J in ipairs({{-515890+515891;-973914+974300},{-1038823+1038824;20134+-19849},{-430597-(-430883),-138985-(-139371)}})do while J[-261028-(-261029)]<J[369855-369853]do local function E(E)return b[E-(-922445-(-959313))]end do local E={E=7221-7184,g=-293714+293771,I=-629318+629321,W=307995-307963,t=-8185+8198,f=-162931-(-162960),Y=-121686-(-121697),L=113569-113507;["\054"]=6421+-6403;["\047"]=-254156-(-254177),A=333431+-333372;l=-523317-(-523365);K=-364625-(-364675),x=-370785+370802,["\043"]=-493510-(-493516),V=222131+-222079;r=-278322+278342;o=-896123+896169,B=-235097-(-235122),O=11949+-11925,j=-523693+523720;a=-619381+619435;k=-597771+597797,H=793882+-793837;G=378900-378881,J=806375+-806370,M=153875-153871,v=-384842-(-384880),P=-799701-(-799702);["\053"]=-693179+693212,F=623522+-623464;i=952739-952709;["\056"]=-81293-(-81316);R=359048-359036,["\055"]=-18291-(-18300),X=240126-240124;d=-881599+881627,["\051"]=-662908+662930;Z=163082+-163068,U=-585162+585178;y=-102335+102391;m=-658240+658240,["\057"]=576996-576962;["\052"]=705491+-705440;T=375138-375102;Q=-491941+491990;s=392481+-392434;c=225261-225201;D=349497-349454,["\048"]=-201738-(-201801);u=856001+-855940;q=1022895+-1022840,e=-822870-(-822905);C=432627-432574,n=-560596+560606;b=421064+-421049;z=-826363+826371,N=-588754-(-588798),w=807903+-807872,["\050"]=207933+-207926;["\049"]=972429-972387,S=98680+-98641,p=494427-494386;h=-63642+63682}local J=string.char local i=math.floor local R=b local p=string.len local y=table.concat local t=string.sub local S=table.insert local F=type for b=391798-391797,#R,757610-757609 do local Y=R[b]if S(X,J(i((Q%(-168929-(-234465)))/(204816+-204560))))end break end M=M+(818394+-818393)end R[b]=y(X)end end end return(function(b,i,R,p,y,t,S,k,N,v,V,J,u,f,Y,W,Q,n,F,X,M,c,h)V,Q,h,N,F,Y,u,k,f,c,J,v,W,n,X,M=function(b,E)local i=Q(E)local R=function(R,p,y,t,S)return J(b,{R,p;y;t;S},E,i)end return R end,function(b)for E=436355-436354,#b,-121820+121821 do Y[b[E]]=(-161030+161031)+Y[b[E]]end if R then local J=R(true)local i=y(J)i[E(278846-241839)],i[E(1046725-1009598)],i[E(137861-100718)]=b,k,function()return-1998496-219147 end return J else return p({},{[E(123241-86114)]=k,[E(-841715-(-878722))]=b;[E(201138-163995)]=function()return-450988+-1766655 end})end end,function(b,E)local i=Q(E)local R=function(R,p,y)return J(b,{R;p,y},E,i)end return R end,function(b,E)local i=Q(E)local R=function(R,p,y,t)return J(b,{R;p,y;t},E,i)end return R end,{},{},function(b,E)local i=Q(E)local R=function(...)return J(b,{...},E,i)end return R end,function(b)local E,J=-1033568+1033569,b[1002748+-1002747]while J do Y[J],E=Y[J]-(-18744-(-18745)),E+(223565-223564)if 385965-385965==Y[J]then Y[J],F[J]=nil,nil end J=b[E]end end,function(b,E)local i=Q(E)local R=function(R,p,y,t,S,F,Y,X,M,Q)return J(b,{R,p,y;t,S,F;Y,X,M;Q},E,i)end return R end,function(b)Y[b]=Y[b]-(826539-826538)if 1043809-1043809==Y[b]then Y[b],F[b]=nil,nil end end,function(J,R,p,y)local x,I,z,Jh,H,G,g,d,O,u,l,Eh,r,Q,m,a,Z,Rh,K,P,Y,T,S,U,B,C,Sh,Fh,j,A,yh,e,ih,th,ph,D,o,bh,M,k,w,Yh,L,s,q while J do if J<-315753+8598894 then if J<5296670-573884 then if J<979161+1972698 then if J<410908+1240644 then if J<984859+-710898 then if J<549960-479847 then if J<-608642+668754 then J=10317658-967345 else J=-246041+6018847 end else if J<1122045-985533 then
